title: Enhanced Interactions
description: A collection of resourcepacks and client side mods that enhance the players interactions with the world and other players
body:
# Enhanced Interactions
This modpack aims to improve the way that a player interacts with the world around them and other players in a near purely client sided way.
> Only SVC required server side modding to work, but you can still join without it

This allows for this modpack to be used on vanilla servers.

> Although caution is advised when using some mods as they might be against the rules of some servers
## Resourcepacks
- Transparent Inventories
- Transparent Addon
- JEI Transparent GUI
- Cubic Sun and Moon
- Dynamic Skies/Hyper Realistic Skies (Use one at a time)
- Fresh Animations
- Eyeless Fresh Moves
- Knight Armor
- Fancy Crops
- Vervada's Enhanced Plants
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- Simple Voice Chat Transparent GUI (Outdated but still compatible & If using a pack to change icons, it's suggested to place it above this one)
- Other resourcepacks included are attached to mods
> It is reccomended to order the resourcepacks in the same order as this list
## ![Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb580bffe593c2380f899088cf149e6e6b8cd28c.png)
## Feature Mods
- AppleSkin
- Better Statistics Screen
- Better F3
- Blur+
- Chat Heads
- Continuity
- Dynamic Fullbright
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- Iris
- Isometric Renders (Disclaimer: this mod has a bit of a bug when trying to render blocks with connected textures)
- Just Enough Items
- Lighty
- Mod Menu
- Mouse Tweaks
- Notebook
- NotEnoughAnimations
- Pick Up Notifier
- Replay Mod
- Replay Voice Chat
- Resourcify
- Shoulder Surfing
- Show Me Your Skin!
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Simple Voice Chat
- Spyglass Improvements
- ThirdPersonBoat
- Visuality
- Voice Chat Soundboard
- WI Zoom
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map
## Performance and Dependancy Mods
- Animatica
- Bobby
- CICADA
- Cloth Config API
- C2M
- Dynamic FPS
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Koliton
- Forge Config API Port
- Indium
- Lithium
- Model Gap Fix
- OptiGUI
- Puzzles Lib
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- TCDCommons API
- Soundboard Core
- owo lib
